subject: Gaming
title: Minecraft: Infinite Possibilities
description: A short lesson to help you apply Minecraft: Infinite Possibilities.

hook.text: One person built a game with no story, no goals, and ugly graphics. It sold over 300 million copies.

buildup.text: Markus 'Notch' Persson created Minecraft in 2009 as a solo project. Blocky, janky, and brilliant.

discovery.text: Players built everything from houses to working computers inside the game. Creativity was the only limit.

twist.text: Microsoft bought Minecraft for $2.5 billion in 2014. It became the best-selling game of all time.

climax.text: Minecraft proved player freedom and creativity could outperform any blockbuster's graphics or budget.

punchline.text: No story, no goals, ugly graphics. The best-selling game ever.

quiz.question: How much did Microsoft pay for Minecraft?
